raw:
{
  "judge_id": "your_judge_id",
  "active_set_recognized": ["R1.5", "R1.7", "RX.1", "RX.3", "RX.4", "RX.5"],
  "scores": {
    "R1.5": 5,
    "R1.7": 3,
    "RX.1": 3,
    "RX.3": 5,
    "RX.4": 5,
    "RX.5": 1
  },
  "rationale": {
    "R1.5": "The agent provides a clear reorganization with rationale for each section change, demonstrating a strong understanding of the structure and flow.",
    "R1.7": "The agent identifies a missing citation element (likely related to prior work on PINN failure modes) but doesn't delve into a comprehensive audit of all citations.",
    "RX.1": "The agent flags uncertainty in some claims, particularly regarding the impact of spectral bias confusion on methodological progress, but doesn't explicitly quantify confidence levels for each recommendation.",
    "RX.3": "The agent accurately identifies the scope of the work and its alignment with the active set of dimensions.",
    "RX.4": "The agent demonstrates awareness of potential harm in misdiagnosis and argues that the proposed taxonomy can mitigate it, but doesn't explicitly identify any harmful patterns in the original text.",
    "RX.5": "The agent does not provide any evidence of source tracing or annotation for changes made to the text."
  },
  "confidence": {
    "R1.5": 0.9,
    "R1.7": 0.8,
    "RX.1": 0.7,
    "RX.3": 0.95,
    "RX.4": 0.85,
    "RX.5": 0.6
  },
  "blockers": []
}

rationale.R1.5: The agent provides a clear reorganization with rationale for each section change, demonstrating a strong understanding of the structure and flow.
rationale.R1.7: The agent identifies a missing citation element (likely related to prior work on PINN failure modes) but doesn't delve into a comprehensive audit of all citations.
rationale.RX.1: The agent flags uncertainty in some claims, particularly regarding the impact of spectral bias confusion on methodological progress, but doesn't explicitly quantify confidence levels for each recommendation.
rationale.RX.3: The agent accurately identifies the scope of the work and its alignment with the active set of dimensions.
rationale.RX.4: The agent demonstrates awareness of potential harm in misdiagnosis and argues that the proposed taxonomy can mitigate it, but doesn't explicitly identify any harmful patterns in the original text.
rationale.RX.5: The agent does not provide any evidence of source tracing or annotation for changes made to the text.
